name: ComponentDoc
description: Renders one /system component entry from the component's co-located metadata JSON: profile badges, description, demo slot, usage rules and token table.

antiPatterns.scenario: Writing component docs as free-form markup next to it
antiPatterns.reason: Splits the docs into a second, driftable source next to the metadata.
antiPatterns.alternative: Extend the component's *.metadata.json and let ComponentDoc render it.

a11y: One <article> per component with a heading hierarchy (h3/h4)
The badge row carries an aria-label naming it as the technical profile
